hero.sub: One place to actually learn boxing and get in the best shape of your life. AI-built plans, real technique, progress you can see — whether you've never wrapped your hands or you've been in the ring for years.

audience.sub: Most apps pick a lane — cardio for beginners or hardcore coaching for pros. RingBornn runs both, in one place, for free.
audience.c1Copy: You want to get fit, build an athletic body and finally learn how to box — starting from absolute zero.
audience.c1p1: Guided from your very first jab
audience.c2Copy: You've got a background and you want structure — real progression that sharpens skill instead of wasting rounds.

features.sub: What competitors split across paid, app-only, hardware-locked products — bundled free and web-first. Here's what's rolling out.
features.plan_c: Personalized, step-by-step sessions rebuilt every day around your profile and progress.
features.belt_c: Climb from Novice to Pro and watch a live bar close in on your goal weight and date.
features.streak_c: Show up daily and keep the fire lit. Consistency tracked separately from your goal.
features.video_c: Free, ungated video tutorials and technique breakdowns — open to everyone.
features.nutrition_c: Meal and nutrition guidance tuned to your body stats and daily training load.
features.calorie_c: Track intake against output so cutting weight or fueling up stays on target.
features.technique_c: Quick self-assessment checklists to keep your form honest between sessions.
features.rest_c: Smart rest days built into every plan, so you build strength instead of burning out.

finalCta.sub: Build your fighter profile in under a minute and unlock your first rank. No account, no card, no gear.

footer.tagline: Free, web-first boxing training for beginners and pros alike. Train like a fighter. Look like an athlete.

auth.notConnected: Sign-in isn't connected yet — add your Supabase keys (see SETUP.md), then restart.
auth.errLink: That sign-in link didn't work. Try again.
auth.errShortPw: Password must be at least 6 characters.

verify.lead: We sent a verification link. Click it to confirm your account, then you're in.
verify.spam: Didn't get it? Check spam, or

onb.pathSub: This sets where your training starts. You can't get it wrong — both paths lead to the same ring.
onb.profileSub: The more the coach knows, the sharper your plan. Nothing here leaves your browser until you save.
onb.goalsLabel: Training goals — pick all that apply
onb.customGoalPlaceholder: + Add your own goal (e.g. spar my brother, drop to 70kg)
onb.errWeight: Enter a real weight — 25–350 kg (55–770 lb).
onb.errHeight: Enter a real height — 90–250 cm (3–8.2 ft).
onb.errTarget: Enter a reachable target — 25–350 kg (55–770 lb).
onb.customTimeframePlaceholder: By when? (e.g. by my birthday in December, in 10 weeks)
onb.setupSub: Gym, a few bits at home, or nothing but your bodyweight — the coach builds around exactly what you've got.
onb.equipPlaceholder: Anything else? (e.g. a bar, a bench, stones, a pull-up frame)
onb.bodyweightNote: No gear? No problem. You'll get shadow boxing, footwork ladders and bodyweight strength circuits that build a real engine.
onb.fuelSub: Nutrition wins fights. We tailor food guidance to what you can actually get and afford — no unrealistic shopping lists.
onb.supSub: Whey, creatine, etc. Off? We build the plan on whole food only.
onb.dietPlaceholder: Allergies, vegetarian/halal, foods you hate, meals per day…

analysis.rankLine: You're rank 1 of {total}. The climb goes all the way to {top}.

dash.previewRest: Your real dashboard — live plans, tracking and lessons — unlocks once you create an account. Nothing here is functional yet.
dash.coachReadSub: Your estimated chance of hitting the goal on time.
dash.streakSub: Finish today's session to light the fire.
dash.nutritionSub: Full meal plans, calorie tracking and AI swaps unlock with the app.
dash.actionsNote: Like the plan? Create an account to save it and start training for real.

dashPage.previewRest: This is the signed-in dashboard — connect Supabase (see SETUP.md) to make log-in real.
dashPage.sub: You're signed in and ready. Build your plan to start the climb.
dashPage.noPlanCopy: Answer a few questions and your AI coach builds a roadmap, rates your chances and sets your fuel plan.
dashPage.lessonsCopy: AI-curated exercises filtered to your equipment — 3D technique demos, muscle maps, and boxing fundamentals.
dashPage.nutritionCopy: Calorie and macro targets from your body stats and training load, with concrete meal ideas for every part of the day.
dashPage.techCopy: Quick self-assessment checklists plus AI video review — film a technique and get honest feedback on every movement.
dashPage.soonNote: Your plan builds rest days in automatically — recover hard, come back stronger.

paths.beginnerBlurb: Never thrown a real punch? Perfect. We start at zero — stance, guard and footwork — and build you into shape one round at a time.
paths.experiencedBlurb: Got a background? We'll skip the basics and push your combinations, conditioning and ring IQ with structured, skill-building work.

nutritionAccess.fullH: Protein, quality food & supplements — no problem

lessons.sub: The full home bodyweight program plus the gym work boxers actually use — bag, bar, bells and rope. Each lesson has a muscle map and a precise 2D technique demo.
lessons.dragHint: Watch the loop — every rep shows the exact movement path.
lessons.musclesHint: Red = the muscles this lesson targets.
lessons.doneHint: Finishing a lesson feeds your streak.

track.streakOnHint: You showed up today — the fire's lit. Come back tomorrow to keep it burning.
track.streakOffHint: Open RingBornn every day to build your streak. Miss a day and it resets to zero.
track.earnXp: Train and show up daily to earn XP. Go quiet and your rank slips.
track.rankUpBody: You earned {rank}. Keep the pressure on.
track.rankDownNote: Rank slipped to {rank} — get back to work to climb again.
track.milestoneBody: {n} days straight. That's real discipline — keep showing up.
track.epicBody: {n} days. You're built different — this is how legends train.
track.calHint: Target is computed from your fighter profile and goal.

nutri.sub: Targets and meals tuned to your body and training load.
nutri.noProfile: Build your fighter profile and the coach will tailor your calories, macros and meals.
nutri.fixStats: Your profile has some impossible stats — fix them and we'll build your nutrition plan.
nutri.perDay: Per day, based on your stats, goal and a 4–5 session training week.
nutri.aiNote: Personalised by the RingBornn AI coach.
nutri.localNote: Built by the RingBornn coach engine — add an AI key for deeper personalisation.

scan.title: Meal scanner
scan.consentBody: RingBornn would like to use your camera to photograph your meal. The photo is sent once for AI calorie analysis and is not stored.
scan.consentPrivacy: You can also upload an existing photo — the camera is never accessed without your permission.
scan.nothingFound: No food detected in this photo.
scan.cameraDenied: Camera access was denied. You can upload a photo instead.
scan.noAi: AI scanning isn't connected yet (no API key). Add the meal manually below.
scan.scanFailed: Couldn't analyze the photo. Try again or add the meal manually.

train.sub: Built from your profile — press Start and follow the coach. Timers run themselves; you just work.
train.doneSub: That's how champions are built — one honest session at a time.
train.dashCopy: A guided session from your profile — timers, technique demos and rest built in.
train.noExercises: Complete onboarding so the coach knows your setup — using the full library for now.
train.activeSub: A light flow to move blood and loosen up — easy pace, no grinding. Recovery is training too.
train.restDaySub: Today is scheduled recovery. Muscle is built while you rest — take it, and come back sharper.
train.restTip1: Sleep 7–9 hours — the real growth window
train.restTip2: Light walk or gentle mobility, nothing taxing
train.restTip3: Hydrate and eat enough protein to rebuild

recovery.title: Rest & Recovery
recovery.trainBody: Today is a training day — get after it. Rest days are already built into your week below.
recovery.activeBody: Today is active recovery: a light, easy flow to loosen up without draining the tank.
recovery.restBody: Today is a full rest day. Muscle is rebuilt while you recover — take it and come back stronger.
recovery.tip2: Stay hydrated and hit your protein target
recovery.tip3: Gentle mobility beats total inactivity on off days

tech.sub: Run the self-assessment between sessions, then film a technique and let the AI coach break down every movement.
tech.dragHint: Watch the reference loop for the exact form
tech.feedbackHint: Records ~4s or upload a clip — analysed on-device frames, not stored.
tech.title: Technique review
tech.consentBody: RingBornn would like to use your camera to film your technique. Frames are sent once for AI analysis and are not stored.
tech.consentPrivacy: You can also upload an existing video — the camera is never accessed without your permission.
tech.recordHint: Stand back so your whole body is in frame, then throw the technique a few times.
tech.cameraDenied: Camera access was denied. You can upload a video instead.
tech.videoFailed: Couldn't read that video. Try a shorter clip or record instead.
tech.noAi: AI review isn't connected yet (no API key). Use the checklist above for now.
tech.analyzeFailed: Couldn't analyze that. Try again with a clearer, well-lit clip.

plans.trialLine: You're on the free trial — {n} days of full access left.
plans.expiredLine: Your free trial has ended. Choose a plan to keep training.
plans.freeTrialSub: Full access to everything — no card needed.
plans.tagline_budget: The essentials to keep training and stay consistent.
plans.tagline_pro: The full fighter toolkit — coaching, nutrition and progress.
plans.tagline_max: Everything, uncapped where it counts. For serious work.
plans.pickedNote: You're now on {plan}. Billing isn't wired up yet — this is a preview selection.
plans.billingNote: Prices are placeholders for the concept. Real card payment (via Stripe) is the final integration step before launch.
plans.bannerWarnRest: Pick a plan now so you don't lose momentum.
plans.bannerExpiredRest: Choose a plan to unlock training again.
plans.lockedRanks: Ranks & progress are part of Pro and Max — earn XP, climb ranks and unlock celebrations.
plans.lockedCalorie: The calorie counter is part of Pro and Max — scan meals and track your intake.
plans.lockedRecovery: Rest & Recovery is included from Budget up. Choose a plan to unlock your recovery schedule.
plans.lockedNutrition: AI Nutrition is part of Pro and Max — macro targets and tailored meal plans.
plans.lockedLessons: The Lesson Library needs an active plan. Choose one to unlock the exercises.
plans.mealsLimited: Your plan shows part of the day — upgrade to Max for every meal
plans.lessonsLimited: Showing {shown} of {total} — upgrade for the full library
plans.plansLeftWeek: {n} of {limit} guided sessions left this week

admin.gateSub: Enter the admin password to open the control panel.
admin.gateUnconfigured: Set the ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variable (in Vercel → Settings → Environment Variables) to enable the admin panel.
admin.unconfigured: Supabase isn't connected — the admin panel needs it to read subscriptions.
admin.denied: This area is for administrators only. If that's you, make sure your email is in the admins list.
admin.empty: No users yet — people appear here after they sign in and open the dashboard.
admin.note: Plan changes reach the user's app the next time they open the dashboard. Real card billing (Stripe) will update this list automatically once connected.
